nodes.name: Fetch File from Backend
nodes.notes: Fetches the raw file from FastAPI. Backend must expose GET /documents/{id}/file that streams the binary. This is necessary because n8n cannot directly read files from another container volume.

nodes.name: Docling OCR
nodes.notes: Timeout set to 120s. Docling returns: { pages: [{ page_num, blocks: [{ block_type, text, confidence, bbox }] }] }

nodes.name: Prepare Vision Input
nodes.notes: Prepares one item per low-confidence page. FastAPI needs GET /documents/{id}/page/{n}/image endpoint that renders the PDF page and returns base64.

nodes.name: Gemma3 Vision Fallback
nodes.notes: Uses ai/gemma3:4B (not llava — not available in Docker Model Runner). Temperature 0 for deterministic extraction. Timeout 90s.

nodes.name: Assemble SDO
nodes.notes: Creates the canonical Structured Document Object. All downstream nodes work from this shape.

nodes.name: Split Blocks for Embedding
nodes.notes: Splits the blocks array into individual items so each block gets embedded separately.

nodes.name: Generate Embedding
nodes.notes: Calls nomic-embed-text via Docker Model Runner. Returns 768-dim vector in data[0].embedding.

nodes.name: Upsert to Qdrant
nodes.notes: PUT is idempotent — safe to re-run. If 404 (collection missing), the Init Qdrant Collection node must run first.

nodes.name: Aggregate Results
nodes.notes: Collects all per-block results after the loop. Builds completion payload for FastAPI.

nodes.name: Init Qdrant Collection
nodes.notes: Run this manually ONCE before first use, or add it before the Docling node with continueOnFail: true. Creates the tender_docs collection with 768-dim Cosine vectors.

parameters.errorMessage: Docling OCR failed. Check: (1) Docling container is running on :8001, (2) file was fetched from backend correctly, (3) timeout is set to 120000ms.
